name: Linzer Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Use blanched almonds or hazelnuts.
2. Beat butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Blend in egg yolks, juice concentrate, and vanilla.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and allspice; mix well. Stir in almonds.
4. Gradually add to butter mixture, mixing until well-blended.
5. Spread 1-1/2 cups batter evenly onto bottom of 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom or 10-inch springform pan.
6. Spread fruit evenly over batter, leaving 1-inch border around the edge.
7. Spoon remaining batter into pastry bag fitted with 1/2-inch plain or star tip.
8. Pipe batter in lattice design over fruit spread.
9. Chill 30 minutes.
10. Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake tart 35 minutes, until crust is golden brown and fruit spread is bubbly. Cool completely on wire rack.
11. Serve at room temperature.
